testcase.name: Shree User Login Tests › should login Shree user successfully
testcase.system-out:
[INFO] 6:05:19 PM - Navigating to Shree login page [INFO] 6:05:25 PM - Attempting to login with mobile: 9011409986 [INFO] 6:05:25 PM - Filling Mobile field with value [INFO] 6:05:29 PM - Filling Password field with value [INFO] 6:05:29 PM - Clicking on Sign In button [INFO] 6:05:29 PM - Login initiated

testcase.error:
[chromium] › Login\shreeLogin.spec.ts:13:3 › Shree User Login Tests › should login Shree user successfully
TimeoutError: page.waitForURL: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. =========================== logs =========================== waiting for navigation until "load" ============================================================
17 | 18 | // Wait for dashboard > 19 | await page.waitForURL(/dashboard|ess-dashboard/, { timeout: 30000 }); | ^ 20 | Logger.info('Shree user login successful'); 21 | 22 | expect(page.url()).toMatch(/dashboard|ess-dashboard/); at C:\Users\groni\HRMS Automation\tests\specs\Login\shreeLogin.spec.ts:19:16
